sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional legal-Islamic analysis of debt-commodity settlement practices in a specific Indonesian village. The work is categorized as cs.AI but concerns Islamic jurisprudence (fiqh) applied to local economic custom ('adat). It is not yet validated peer-review published (future date 2026-04-25 suggests preprint status). Islamic legal interpretations of contract validity (akad) are subject to ongoing scholarly debate across different madhabs and jurisdictions, making the conclusions provisional rather than established.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 金銭と物質の交換は、意図と利息の微妙なバランスの中で真実を求める。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 貨幣と商品の間の二重の約束の流れ、正義と信頼の相互交差する道。
